reports.name: Vorstperiodes
reports.query:
SELECT *
FROM (
    SELECT
        vp.STATION              AS stationsCode,
        st.OMSCHRIJVING         AS station,
        vp.VOLGNR               AS volgnr,
        vp.BEGIN                AS begin,
        vp.EINDE                AS einde,
        vp.DAGEN                AS dagen,
        vp.HELLMANN             AS hellmann
    FROM vorstperiodes vp
    JOIN stations st ON st.CODE = vp.STATION
) _t
WHERE 1=1
<#SELECTIONS>
ORDER BY begin
